metadata.description: Open plugin marketplace for Claude Code AI-driven development

plugins.name: marvin-core-pack
plugins.description: Core developer tools: commits, PRs, code review, debugging, ADRs, changelogs, and onboarding

plugins.name: marvin-security-pack
plugins.description: Security-focused development tools: OWASP scanning, threat modeling, secret scanning, dependency audits, IaC review, CI/CD security, compliance checks, pentest planning, and security fix generation

plugins.name: marvin-taskmaster-pack
plugins.description: Spec-driven task pipeline: interactive spec co-creation, batch dispatch to headless agents, and PR review fixing
